calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Brian F Connors In Support Of Application For Court Default Judgment To Quiet Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Michael Lakich; Defendant Michael Lakich, the testate and intestate successors of Michael Lakich, deceased and all persons claiming by through or under such persons; Defendant Ella De Heer and the testate and intestate successors of Ella De Heer, deceased and all persons claiming by through or under such persons; Defendant Nicholas Lakich, in his capacity as successor to Michael Lakich; Defendant Anna Maria Fridman, in her capacity as successor to Michale Lakich; and Defendant Ella De Heer.

Dept:505; Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:04:18 a.m. and concluding at 9:21:40 a.m.. (D505)

Brian Connors, Esq. representing Plaintiff Frank J. Lesser who was present, placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Michael Lakich; Defendant Michael Lakich, the testate and intestate successors of Michael Lakich, deceased and all persons claiming by through or under such persons; Defendant Ella De Heer and the testate and intestate successors of Ella De Heer, deceased and all persons claiming by through or under such persons; Defendant Nicholas Lakich, in his capacity as successor to Michael Lakich; Defendant Anna Maria Fridman, in her capacity as successor to Michale Lakich; and Defendant Ella De Heernot appearing.

Complaint filed on Feb-26-2024.
Default filed against Defendants filed Feb-07-2025 and Feb-13-2025.
Notice of Motion for request for default judgment filed Feb-13-2025.

Counsel provides a brief summary for the request for Quiet title.
Counsel examines Plaintiff.

The Court admits as evidence Contract/ Agreement for the sale of real estate and Installment payment note.

Exhibits 4,5 and 7 admitted by the court.

Plaintiff orally request to dismiss Defendants All persons unknown claiming any legal or equitable rightm titlem estatem lien or interest in the real property adverse to Plaintiff's title or any cloud on Plaintiff's title and Defendant Does 1 - 30.

The Court Grants plaintiff's request to dismiss 2 defendants.

Good cause appearing the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven their prima facie case and grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff Frank J. Lesser, individually and as the personal representative of the estate of Georgina L. Lesser.

See scanned order.

Parties stipulate the return of the exhibits.
